problem_statement: Developments cycles take too long and produce inconsistent, potentially insecure results.
purpose_and_goals: Create multiple personas capable of interacting to produce secure, high quality code, fit for purpose
functional_requirements: A working end to end pipeline that produces the expected result.
acceptance_criteria: A working end to end pipeline that produces the expected result.
timeline_and_cost_estimates: quick and as low as possible
risks_and_assumptions: risks are that the loops will run out of control and run up costs.  Unconstrained requirements produces garbage results
security_and_risk_considerations: exposed credentials, data loss, attack vector, delivery of insecure platforms/products
supply_chain_security_expectations: maintained SBOM for tracability according to industry best practices.
